name.en: Azure Ocean Dragon Lord - Neo-Daedalus Rage
name.ja: <ruby>蒼<rt>そう</rt></ruby><ruby>海<rt>かい</rt></ruby><ruby>竜<rt>りゅう</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>しん</rt></ruby>－ネオダイダロス・レイジ
name.zh-CN: 苍海龙神－超代达罗斯・狂怒

text.en:
4 monsters
If this card is Link Summoned: You can Special Summon up to 3 monsters that mention "Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon" from your GY to your zones this card points to, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn. This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Monster Zone. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up "Umi" you control to the GY; send all cards on the field to the GY, except "Umi".
text.zh-CN:
怪兽4只
①：此卡连接召唤的情况下可以发动。从自己墓地将最多3只记载有“龙都 亚特兰蒂斯”卡名的怪兽特殊召唤至此卡连接端的自己场上。此效果发动后，直至回合结束时为止自己不可特殊召唤怪兽。②：此卡只要存在于怪兽区域，卡名视为“海”。③：在每个自己・对手回合中1次，将自己场上的1张表侧表示的“海”送至墓地可以发动。将除“海”以外的、场上的卡全部送至墓地。

series: Atlantis, City of the Sea Dragon
